commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a same-service macOS LaunchAgent stop guard in `stopLaunchAgent` and focused launchd tests for in-band stop refusal, disable-stop refusal, inherited service markers, and external label overrides.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +116. Total +138 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. full live reproduction was run in this review. Source inspection shows current main can enter the unguarded `launchctl bootout` stop path, and the linked issue supplies real incident logs for the outage shape.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs maintainer policy approval and contributor real behavior proof, not an automated repair pass.
